newsSinceJun6: No material fundamental news since June 6. The story is price action: after an early-June blowoff (intraday ~845,000 KRW on June 2), the stock sold off ~25% to 610,000 by June 8 amid heavy volatility, then bounced +2.13% to 623,000 today on no identifiable catalyst. No new contracts, earnings, capacity, or Samsung announcements found; standing fundamentals remain Samsung's 35% controlling stake, the Future Robotics Office, and planned RB-Y1 deployment on Samsung lines.

sources.label: Joongang Economy News - Rainbow Robotics 5-session volatility (June)
Samsung Newsroom - Samsung becomes largest shareholder in Rainbow Robotics
The Robot Report - Samsung stake increase and RB-Y1 factory deployment plans

verdicts.rankRationale: The ~25% pullback from the June 2 blowoff partially de-crowds a name this page already penalizes as 'crowded and already repriced,' modestly improving asymmetry, but yesterday's verdict already incorporated the 610,000 print and today's +2.1% no-news bounce is drift, not new evidence.
verdicts.bull: Cleanest pure-play public humanoid name in Asia with Samsung as 35% controlling shareholder and a captive deployment channel (RB-Y1 on Samsung manufacturing lines); the drawdown from ~845,000 to ~623,000 restores some entry asymmetry if commercialization milestones land.
verdicts.neutral: Still +26% YTD at a $9.1B cap on minimal revenue; the sell-off mean-reverts hype rather than changing fundamentals, leaving the stock range-bound between Samsung-proxy flows and the absence of disclosed order economics.
verdicts.bear: Valuation remains divorced from revenue, the shareholder base is retail-heavy and flow-driven (intraday swings of 6-11% on no news), and any slip in Samsung's internal deployment timeline or a KOSDAQ robotics de-rating compresses the multiple fast.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Disclosed RB-Y1 supply/deployment order from Samsung with unit and revenue specifics, or Samsung Future Robotics Office roadmap announcements.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowded retail positioning unwinding further on no news; valuation reset toward fundamentals on a tiny revenue base.
